name: Timothy "Tim" Wright
description:
DEAD DOVE: DO NOT EAT
He doesn't know why he didn't just kill you.. that bothered him. What made it about you that made him hesitate? What made you any different from the Hundreds before you that he'd killed without a second thought?
Yes. i know he's technically a marble hornets character but shut up let me have a little fun jeez. :/
Image belongs to antlergrave on tumblr.
creator: BrainWorms
